campaigns.name: Lovable - AI App Builder - CPS (WW)
campaigns.description:
Lovable is an advanced AI-powered app builder that allows creators, entrepreneurs, and developers to build full-stack web applications using natural language. Users can generate code, deploy instantly, and edit their apps in real-time through an intuitive chat interface.

Targeting: Entrepreneurs, product managers, software developers, and tech enthusiasts aged 20-55 who want to build and launch MVPs quickly without deep coding knowledge.
Restrictions: No search arbitrage, no trademark bidding, and no misleading claims regarding AI capabilities.

The program combines clinical expertise with prescription access to help patients achieve sustainable metabolic health improvements through a streamlined digital consultation process.
Converts on a completed purchase and prescription enrollment.

Restrictions: No incentivized traffic or brand bidding is permitted. Marketing must avoid unsubstantiated medical claims or deceptive "before and after" imagery.
Video Creatives

campaigns.name: Help Injury - Roblox Abuse Mass Tort - CPA (US)
campaigns.description:
Help Injury facilitates legal recourse for families affected by child safety failures and predatory incidents occurring within the Roblox gaming platform. This mass tort initiative focuses on identifying eligible claimants to join a collective legal action aimed at securing compensation for negligence and lack of oversight.
Converts on a valid lead form submission from a qualified claimant or legal guardian.
Targeting: Parents and legal guardians of minors (ages 5-17) who utilize online sandbox games, specifically those engaged with child safety advocacy and legal victim support groups. Excluded states include California, Indiana, Louisiana, and Tennessee
Restrictions: No incentivized traffic, brand bidding, or misleading creative assets promising specific settlement amounts. All email and SMS traffic requires prior approval and adherence to strict compliance guidelines.

This campaign offers consumers in the United Kingdom the chance to participate in a sponsored prize draw to win a high-specification LG OLED television. The promotion requires a straightforward, single opt-in form submission for entry, facilitating connections with various third-party sponsor messages.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Consumer audience across the United Kingdom interested in premium home electronics, home entertainment systems, and entering sweepstakes for high-value prizes.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: UpLevelRewards - Makita Tools - SOI (UK)
campaigns.description:
This campaign offers consumers in the United Kingdom the opportunity to enter a sponsored prize draw to win a selection of high-quality Makita power tools or a retail voucher of equivalent value. Entry is achieved through a quick, single opt-in form submission, which facilitates connections with various sponsor offers.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: UK consumers interested in home improvement, construction, DIY projects, and high-quality power tools, as well as those who frequently enter online contests and sweepstakes.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Rewards Giant - iPhone 17 - $1000 - SOI (AU)
campaigns.description:
This campaign offers Australian consumers the chance to participate in a sponsored prize draw to win the latest iPhone 17 model or a cash equivalent prize of $1000. The promotion requires a simple form submission for entry, connecting participants with various third-party sponsor messages in exchange for their participation.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Broad Australian consumer audience interested in high-value electronics, mobile technology, and sweepstakes entry opportunities.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Rewards Giant - Dewalt Tools $1000 - SOI (CA)
campaigns.description:
This Canadian rewards campaign provides consumers with the opportunity to enter a prize draw to win $1000 worth of Dewalt tools or a gift voucher of equivalent value. The promotion facilitates entry through a quick, single-page form submission, connecting participants with various sponsor opportunities.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Canadian consumers interested in home improvement, construction, DIY projects, and high-quality power tools, as well as those who frequently enter online contests and sweepstakes.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: National Consumer Center - Lenor Scent Booster - SOI (UK)
campaigns.description:
This campaign offers consumers in the United Kingdom the chance to participate in a sponsored prize draw to win a supply of Lenor Scent Booster or a retail voucher of equivalent value. The promotion requires a straightforward, single opt-in form submission for entry, facilitating connections with various third-party sponsor messages.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Broad consumer audience across the United Kingdom interested in household cleaning products, laundry supplies, and value-saving opportunities through sweepstakes and contests.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: National Consumer Center - Shein £1000 - SOI (UK)
campaigns.description:
This campaign offers consumers in the United Kingdom the opportunity to enter a sponsored prize draw to win a substantial £1000 shopping voucher for the online fast-fashion retailer, Shein. Entry requires a simple, single opt-in form submission, which facilitates connections with various third-party promotional offers.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Consumers, typically young adults and female audiences, interested in fast fashion, online clothing trends, and beauty accessories, as well as those who participate in online contests.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Rewards Giant - eBike $1000 - SOI (AU)
campaigns.description:
This rewards program provides Australian consumers with the opportunity to enter a prize draw for a $1000 e-bike or a value-equivalent voucher. The process involves the user completing a series of qualification questions and successfully engaging with a required number of subsequent sponsor offers to gain a valid entry into the contest.
Converts on validated multi-step form completion and qualified lead submission
Targeting: General audience of Australian consumers seeking value through reward programs, contests, and sweepstakes. The ideal participant shows interest in outdoor activities, new consumer technology, or transportation alternatives.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Rewards Giant - iPhone 17 $1000 - SOI (CA)
campaigns.description:
This campaign offers Canadian consumers the chance to participate in a sponsored prize draw to win the latest iPhone 17 model or a cash equivalent prize of $1000. The promotion requires a straightforward, single opt-in form submission for entry, facilitating connections with various third-party sponsor messages.
Converts on single opt-in lead
Targeting: Broad Canadian consumer audience interested in high-value electronics, mobile technology, and entering sweepstakes for major prizes.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Rewards Giant - Target $1000 - CPA (AU)
campaigns.description:
This rewards program provides Australian consumers with the opportunity to enter a prize draw to win a $1000 Target gift card or shopping voucher. Entry requires the user to complete a series of qualification questions and engage successfully with a specified number of third-party sponsor offers to finalize the contest submission.
Converts on validated multi-step form completion and qualified lead submission
Targeting: Broad Australian consumer audience interested in retail shopping, household goods, and value-saving opportunities through rewards programs and contests.
Any custom creatives or subject/from lines must be approved before use.

campaigns.name: Maxbone - Freeze Dried Dog Food & Accessories - RevShare (WW)
campaigns.description:
Maxbone is a luxury pet lifestyle brand combining high-end fashion and wellness-focused function. Its 2026 catalog features designer apparel, freeze-dried food, and specialized travel gear like the global citizen carrier.
Converts on Sale.
Targeting: The primary audience includes design-conscious "Pet Parents" and urban owners seeking premium, sustainable dog gear.
Restrictions: No brand bidding on "Maxbone" or related trademarks. Modification of site graphics or text is prohibited, and affiliates cannot display the site in frames without prior permission. Coupon sites are not allowed.

campaigns.name: Norton VPN - Free Trial - CPL (US) [iOS]
campaigns.description:
Norton VPN provides users with military-grade encryption to browse the web privately and secure their devices against evolving cyber threats. It offers fast, reliable internet access across both public and private networks, ensuring sensitive user data remains protected from hackers and third-party tracking.
Converts on successful activation of the 7-day free trial.
Targeting: Security-conscious individuals in the US, frequent travelers who rely on public Wi-Fi, and remote workers looking to anonymize their digital footprint.
Restrictions: No incentivized traffic, fraudulent sign-ups, or misleading claims regarding the trial terms. All promotional creatives must adhere to standard brand safety guidelines.

campaigns.name: Motel 6 - Discount Nationwide Motel - RevShare (US)
campaigns.description:
Motel 6 offers budget-friendly lodging solutions across the United States, making it a go-to choice for cost-conscious travelers. This affiliate program allows partners to earn a percentage of completed bookings generated through their referral links. With a well-recognized brand and nationwide coverage, it provides high conversion potential for travel-focused traffic.
Converts on Completed room booking
Targeting: Budget-conscious travelers, road trippers, families on vacation, and business travelers looking for affordable, no-frills accommodations in the US.
Restrictions: Brand bidding on search engines is strictly prohibited. Fraudulent bookings and self-referrals will result in immediate commission forfeiture.

campaigns.name: xlWin - $1000 Shengsiong Gift Card - SOI (SG)
campaigns.description:
Consumers can enter for a chance to win a $1000 Sheng Siong gift card by completing a short sign-up process.
Converts on single opt-in.
Targeting: Adults aged 25–65 in Singapore interested in groceries, supermarket promotions, and free giveaways.
Restrictions: No Incentive traffic, must be 18+, No misleading advertising such as false promises, No ads/text/creatives mentioning anything related to pandemic issues (COVID-19, SARS, MERS, etc.) and Ads/texts/creatives for pre-landers, WhatsApp, and Facebook traffic must be sent for approval before running

campaigns.name: xlWin - $1000 Uniqlo Voucher - SOI (SG)
campaigns.description:
Consumers can participate for a chance to win a $1000 Uniqlo voucher by completing a simple sign-up.
Converts on single opt-in.
Targeting: Adults aged 18–60 in Singapore interested in clothing, fashion deals, and retail giveaways.
Restrictions: No Incentive traffic, must be 18+, No misleading advertising such as false promises, No ads/text/creatives mentioning anything related to pandemic issues (COVID-19, SARS, MERS, etc.) and Ads/texts/creatives for pre-landers, WhatsApp, and Facebook traffic must be sent for approval before running

campaigns.name: xlWin - $500 Worth of Kinder Products  - SOI (SG)
campaigns.description:
Consumers can sign up for a chance to win $500 worth of Kinder products, including favorites like Kinder Bueno, Kinder Joy, and more.
Converts on single opt-in.
Targeting: Adults aged 18–55 in Singapore with interests in sweets, family snacks, and grocery giveaways.
Restrictions: No Incentive traffic, must be 18+, No misleading advertising such as false promises, No ads/text/creatives mentioning anything related to pandemic issues (COVID-19, SARS, MERS, etc.) and Ads/texts/creatives for pre-landers, WhatsApp, and Facebook traffic must be sent for approval before running

campaigns.name: JobNation - Local Job Matcher - SOI (US)
campaigns.description:
JobNation is a high-converting lead generation platform designed to streamline the employment search process for individuals across the United States.
Converts on a valid survey submission.
Targeting: Men and women aged 18-65 located in the United States who are currently unemployed, underemployed, or actively seeking new career opportunities.
Restrictions: Incentivized traffic, SMS, and fraudulent leads are strictly prohibited.

campaigns.name: Voissy - Online Survey and Rewards Panel - DOI (IT)
campaigns.description:
Voissy is an online survey and insights platform where users can share their opinions and earn rewards. Members join the Voissy Panel for free, complete surveys on a wide range of topics, and accumulate points for every fully completed questionnaire. Points can be redeemed for PayPal cash, Amazon gift cards, and other reward options.
Targeting: Aged 18–65 interested in earning rewards, taking surveys, or participating in online panels. Ideal for students, stay-at-home parents, budget-conscious consumers, and users looking for flexible side-income activities they can do on their own time. Appeals to individuals who enjoy sharing opinions and influencing brands through market research.
Restrictions: No false earning claims, no promises of guaranteed income, no incentivized sign-ups, and no misleading copy about survey frequency or payout amounts. No brand bidding or unauthorized use of Voissy trademarks.

campaigns.name: Seafight - Online Game - CPL (US,UK,DE + more) [Desktop]
campaigns.description:
Seafight is an immersive online pirate MMO where players battle on the high seas, explore vast oceans, and upgrade their ships to dominate the waters. Engage in thrilling naval combat, form alliances, and embark on epic adventures in this free-to-play browser game.
Converts on user register, download and installs the application, and logs into the game for the first time.
Targeting: Users interested in online gaming, adventure, and pirate-themed MMOs.
Restrictions: No incentivized, or virtual currency traffic. No pop-unders, pop-ups, push notifications, Google Display Network, search advertising, brand bidding, or promotional emails.
Creatives by approval.

campaigns.name: Game of Thrones - Game - CPL (US,UK,DE +more) [Desktop]
campaigns.description:
League of Angels 3 is an epic fantasy MMORPG where players assemble legendary heroes, engage in strategic battles, and explore a breathtaking world filled with magic and danger. With stunning visuals, intense PvP combat, and deep character progression, this free-to-play game offers an immersive RPG experience.
Converts on user register, download and installs the application, and logs into the game for the first time.
Targeting: Users interested in MMORPGs, fantasy games, and strategic gameplay.
Restrictions: No incentivized, or virtual currency traffic. No pop-unders, pop-ups, push notifications, Google Display Network, search advertising, brand bidding, or promotional emails.
Creatives by approval.

campaigns.name: Surveys 4 Rewards - CPL (US)
campaigns.description:
Surveys 4 Rewards allows individuals to earn rewards by sharing their opinions. Participants can earn up to $100 per survey and choose from multiple reward redemption options. The platform provides flexibility to earn at one’s own pace and convenience.
Converts on valid form submission with an accurate and contactable phone number and email
Targeting: US residents aged 25+
Restrictions: Must provide a valid and contactable phone number and email. No incentivized traffic or misleading claims. All creatives and traffic sources must comply with platform guidelines. No prepop.

campaigns.name: Gravy Pass -  Earn Rewards - CPA (US) {Mobile -Android only}
campaigns.description:
Gravy Pass is a mobile-first rewards platform that allows users to earn cash-back by playing games, completing tasks, and shopping at popular retailers.
Converts on user Adds app to Wallet.
Targeting: The primary audience includes mobile gamers, "beermoney" enthusiasts, and budget-conscious shoppers aged 18 to 45. The offer performs best on social media platforms like TikTok and Instagram where "fast cash" and "paid to play" hooks resonate with younger demographics.
Restrictions: No Brand Bidding on "Gravy Pass" or trademarked terms is permitted. Incentivized traffic is typically restricted unless the specific offer wall or network placement is pre-approved for "rewarded" placements. Affiliates should monitor their lead quality closely, as high "uninstall" or "remove from wallet" rates shortly after conversion can lead to clawbacks or account suspension.

campaigns.name: Everyday Winner - Amazon $500 Gift Card - SOI (US)
campaigns.description:
Everyday Winner is a popular rewards and sweepstakes platform that offers users a chance to win a $500 Amazon Gift Card. This offer focuses on building a database of interested consumers through a quick and easy entry process.
Converts on Single Opt-In
Targeting: General consumer base in the US only. While it is open to all adults (18+), the best-performing demographics for this specific Amazon offer are typically aged 40+, both male and female.
Restrictions: No incentive traffic or Brand Bidding is permitted. Strict Compliance: Ad copy must explicitly state this is a sweepstakes/chance to win and not a guaranteed reward. Using deceptive language like "Claim your gift card now" or "You have been selected" (without a clear contest context) is prohibited. Creatives to be made for approval

campaigns.name: PlayStation - Sweepstakes - SOI (FR)
campaigns.description:
Users can enter their information for a chance to win a PlayStation.
Offer converts on the user registration.
Targeting: +18 from France metropolitaine.
Restrictions: Cashback, display, incentive, keyword, product catalogue, promo code, retargeting and adult.

campaigns.name: Ikea - Sweepstakes - SOI (FR)
campaigns.description:
Users can enter for a chance to win a 500€ IKEA gift card.
Offer converts SOI.
Targeting: +18 from France metropolitaine.
Restrictions: Cashback, display, incentive, keyword, product catalogue, promo code, retargeting and adult.

campaigns.name: HomeBase - Homeownership Services - CPL (US)
campaigns.description:
HomeBase provides a comprehensive suite of homeownership services designed to help users lower mortgage payments, reduce insurance costs, and finance essential property improvements. By matching homeowners with competitive rates, the platform focuses on maximizing overall property value and long-term financial health.
Converts on a successful first-page lead submission.
Targeting: Current homeowners in the United States, typically aged 30-65, who are interested in financial optimization, debt reduction, or property renovation.
Restrictions: Ensure all lead data is valid and follows pre-population parameters. No incentive traffic

campaigns.name: Cash Legends - Gaming - CPA (US) {iOS}
campaigns.description:
Cash Legends is a competitive mobile gaming platform that allows users to participate in fast-paced, skill-based challenges for the opportunity to win real currency. The app connects players in head-to-head matches across various casual titles, rewarding top performers with tangible cash prizes based on their in-game skills.
Converts on app install and open, with tiered payouts triggered by winning specific numbers of cash games and completing a minimum deposit of $10.
Targeting: US-based mobile users aged 18-45 who are interested in casual gaming, competitive tournaments, and real-money reward applications.
Restrictions: Fraudulent installs are strictly prohibited. Creatives must not make misleading claims regarding guaranteed earnings.

campaigns.name: Monopoly GO - Boardgame App - CPA (US) [Mobile]
campaigns.description:
Monopoly GO is a high-engagement mobile adaptation of the classic board game, blending traditional mechanics with social features and city-building elements. It leverages massive brand recognition to drive high user retention and long-term monetization through competitive gameplay and collectible progression systems.
Converts on initial install and open, with additional tiered payouts triggered by the user reaching specific milestone levels.
Targeting: Fans of casual board games, social casino enthusiasts, and mobile gamers aged 18-55 who enjoy competitive social interactions and progression-based mechanics.
Restrictions: No incentivized traffic allowed unless specifically authorized by the advertiser. Fraudulent installs and brand bidding on trademarked terms are strictly prohibited.
